title: Hunch dogfoods Architectural Conformance: 4 predicates guard the wiki's core intents
context: Shipped from the roadmap. `hunch conform` on hunch itself was empty — the flagship feature unused in the flagship repo.
decision: Predicates attached to the wiki decisions and verified green: renderHunchSection not-calls recs (committed grounding docs stay public-only); renderAdoptedDoc not-calls writeFileAtomic (the renderer is pure — all writes go through generateWiki); computeWikiDrift calls wikiStatus (drift consults the one state machine); generateWiki transitively calls writeFileAtomic (every page write rides the atomic path). `hunch conform --strict` now machine-checks what the constraints only said in prose.
alternatives_rejected: A not-calls predicate on the node built-in writeFileSync: built-ins aren't graph symbols — the predicate soft-passed as 'not found', a never-checking rule; dropped for the writeFileAtomic form that actually resolves
